reference: Hi, Rashmi. Welcome to HCM. There is nothing to worry about. Avoid fried foods, chilies, and junk food for a few weeks. You can take Metrogyl or Ornidazole tablets for five days as there is a possibility of having a mixed infection. Okay, goodbye.
text: Hi, Rashmi. Welcome to HCM. There is nothing to worry about. Avoid fried foods, chilies, and junk food for a few weeks. You can take Metrogel or Ornidazole tablets for five days as possibility of having a mixed infection. Okay, goodbye.
